mapper.select: select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_SHAFT_FLOOR_D where id = #{id} and (deleted is null or deleted = 0)
select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_SHAFT_FLOOR_D where monitor_id = #{monitorId} and (deleted is null or deleted = 0) order by sort asc, id asc
select * from ODS_DWEQ_DM_SHAFT_FLOOR_D where device_id = #{deviceId} and (deleted is null or deleted = 0) order by sort asc, id asc
